title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.270 - May issue subway revenue bonds
text:
82.270.  May issue subway revenue bonds. — Any such city may issue and sell, at not less than par, its bonds, payable out of the revenue or income from such subway or subways.
(RSMo 1939 § 7641) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7498; 1919 § 8909; 1909 § 9761
